pages.title: Problem: "Can't find Importer/Exporter in dropdown"
pages.text: $(bold)Cause$(): No Importers/Exporters placed in CM dimension$(br2)$(bold)Solution$(): $(li)Enter CM dimension $(li)Place at least one Importer or Exporter $(li)Exit CM dimension $(li)Reopen PreFab GUI (dropdown should now show the gate)

pages.title: Problem: "Resources not entering factory"
pages.text: $(bold)Checklist$(): $(li)[DONE] Importer placed inside CM? $(li)[DONE] PreFab face set to PULL mode? $(li)[DONE] PreFab face linked to correct Importer UUID? $(li)[DONE] Chest connected to PreFab face in Overworld? $(li)[DONE] Chest has items? $(li)[DONE] PreFab in SIMULATING or CACHED state?

pages.title: Problem: "Resources not exiting factory"
pages.text: $(bold)Checklist$(): $(li)[DONE] Exporter placed next to machine output? $(li)[DONE] Machine producing items? $(li)[DONE] PreFab face set to PUSH mode? $(li)[DONE] PreFab face linked to correct Exporter UUID? $(li)[DONE] Chest connected to PreFab face in Overworld? $(li)[DONE] Chest has space for items? $(li)[DONE] PreFab in SIMULATING or CACHED state?
